title: Poll: Majority of Americans Don't Want to Live Near an AI Data Center
summary: More than half of US residents—53%—do not want an AI data center built in their neighborhood, according to a new survey from real estate site Redfin. I'm now following how the AI-driven memory shortage is impacting the entire consumer electronics market.
